_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Implement risk assessment and authorization requirements per the Risk Management Framework (RMF) process for dedicated cyber defense systems within the enterprise, and document and maintain records for them.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including policy development, role and responsibility definition, escalation protocols, exception management, and board-level model risk reporting.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-002 (DG, cosine: 0.490), SP-K-009 (SP, cosine: 0.472).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.531). Shared vocabulary: [framework, management, risk]. DCWF-only terms [assessment, authorization, cyber, dedicated, defense, document] vs WIDAI-only terms [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.871, R=0.880). Balanced P/R — the 28-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (93.0%). "Implement risk assessment and authorization requirements per the Risk Management" and "Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.515 ≈ STS 0.531 (gap 0.015). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [framework, management, risk] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [framework, management, risk]. DCWF-only: [assessment, authorization, cyber, dedicated, defense, document]. WIDAI-only: [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception].
